assert.// rationale: Thresholds split into two layers. (a) Category gates that stay hard `error` because they're stable + audit-presence-only: a11y / best-practices / SEO. (b) Performance + Core Web Vitals soft-landed to `warn` with thresholds set to current pilot-week measurements + ~10% headroom — so green means 'no regression past today' rather than 'we hit aspirational throttled-emulator targets we never actually hit'. The locked KPI targets per CLAUDE.md 2026-05-22 row 1 are LCP <1.5s · INP <100ms · CLS <0.05 — those are the post-pilot perf-sprint goals, not the V1-pilot CI gate. Ratchet down quarterly after the real perf work (image audit · RSC streaming · bundle slim · long-task profiling) lands.
